title: Treasure in Malta
writer: Anne Barrett, Mary Cathcart Borer, David Scott Daniell
actors: Mario Debono, Aidan Mompalao de Piro, Marylu Coppini
plot: Tom and Sukie arrive in Malta to spend the holidays with their father, an archaeologist digging for a legendary golden statue of Calypso on the island of Gozo. He fails to meet the children who make friends with Jiminy, a Maltese ...
